data.title: Amazon turns to AI to push indecisive shoppers toward purchases
data.description:
Amazon has introduced a new artificial intelligence tool designed to guide hesitant shoppers toward making purchases. The move comes as more e-commerce companies continue to add more AI solutions on their platforms to assist buyers and drive sales, driving up the competition between rivals in the industry. Amazon’s new feature is called Help Me Decide […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/amazon-ai-to-push-indecisive-shoppers/

data.title: Turkey Leads MENA with $200B in Crypto Volume – but Chainalysis Warns It’s ‘All Speculation’
data.description:
New Chainalysis figures show Turkey maintaining strong crypto volume despite stricter oversight. Retail activity has cooled amid KYC and transfer caps, while institutional investors and altcoin trading have continued to expand across the MENA region.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/turkey-leads-mena-with-200b-in-crypto-volume-but-chainalysis-warns-its-all-speculation/

data.title: EU companies reach agreement to combine satellite businesses
data.description:
Three major European aerospace companies have reached an agreement to combine their satellite businesses in a bid to take on Elon Musk’s SpaceX in the global space market. Leonardo, Airbus, and Thales announced the preliminary deal after months of negotiations between the defense contractors. The merger will form a new company expected to bring in […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/eu-companies-reach-agreement/

data.title: Nokia dismisses bubble fears as AI demand, cloud services spark optimism
data.description:
Nokia’s CEO, Justin Hotard, Intel’s former executive vice president and general manager, and data center & AI group, is bullish about his firm and the growing AI sector that has led the company to a strong year-to-date. Speaking about the fears of an AI “bubble” in a Reuters interview, he likened the current AI boom […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/nokia-dismisses-fears-ai-spark-optimism/

data.title: How high would Bitcoin price need to go to erase US $38 trillion debt?
data.description:
The US has never owed more money that it does today, and some believe the solution isn’t political reform or higher taxes but Bitcoin itself. America’s national debt has crossed $38 trillion, surpassing the country’s annual GDP by nearly 31%.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/can-bitcoin-be-the-uss-remedy-to-a-38-trillion-debt-crisis/

data.title: Visa and Mastercard To Pay $199,500,000 Settlement After Allegedly Forcing Users To Cover Costs of Fraudulent Transactions
data.description:
Visa and Mastercard just agreed to pay a whopping $199. 5 million to resolve a class action lawsuit that’s been moving through the courts since 2016. The lawsuit accused the payment giants of forcing businesses to absorb costs from fraudulent transactions involving counterfeit, lost and stolen cards
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/10/23/visa-and-mastercard-to-pay-199500000-settlement-after-allegedly-forcing-users-to-cover-costs-of-fraudulent-transactions/

data.title: Stop Being Republicans’ Lapdog’ – Crypto CEOs Face Senate Fury as Bill Stalls
data.description:
Democratic senators erupted at crypto CEOs during Capitol Hill meetings demanding they stop being "an arm of the Republican Party" over leaked DeFi proposals, leaving industry leaders concerned the market-structure bill could drag into next year while Polymarket bettors slashed passage odds to just 19% from 87% earlier this summer, despite House approval of the 294-137 vote in July.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/stop-being-republicans-lapdog-crypto-ceos-face-senate-fury-as-bill-stalls/
